variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 5374 Engine Breather Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAO 5374 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 5374 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 5374 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: ENGINE BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 172.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 143.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 40.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 126.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 116.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 27.0 mm
